name: Dark
description:
[gold]Passive:[/gold] At the end of turn, increase this Orb's damage by [blue][Passive][/blue].
[gold]Evoke:[/gold] Deal [blue][Evoke][/blue] damage to the enemy with the lowest HP.
description_raw:
[gold]Passive:[/gold] At the end of turn, increase this Orb's damage by [blue]{Passive}[/blue].
[gold]Evoke:[/gold] Deal [blue]{Evoke}[/blue] damage to the enemy with the lowest HP.
description_zh:
[gold]被动：[/gold]回合结束时，将这个充能球的伤害增加[blue][Passive][/blue]。
[gold]激发：[/gold]对生命值最少的敌人造成[blue][Evoke][/blue]点伤害。
description_raw_zh:
[gold]被动：[/gold]回合结束时，将这个充能球的伤害增加[blue]{Passive}[/blue]。
[gold]激发：[/gold]对生命值最少的敌人造成[blue]{Evoke}[/blue]点伤害。

name: Frost
description:
[gold]Passive:[/gold] At the end of turn, gain [blue][Passive][/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
[gold]Evoke:[/gold] Gain [blue][Evoke][/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
description_raw:
[gold]Passive:[/gold] At the end of turn, gain [blue]{Passive}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
[gold]Evoke:[/gold] Gain [blue]{Evoke}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
description_zh:
[gold]被动：[/gold]在回合结束时，获得[blue][Passive][/blue]点[gold]格挡[/gold]。
[gold]激发：[/gold]获得[blue][Evoke][/blue]点[gold]格挡[/gold]。
description_raw_zh:
[gold]被动：[/gold]在回合结束时，获得[blue]{Passive}[/blue]点[gold]格挡[/gold]。
[gold]激发：[/gold]获得[blue]{Evoke}[/blue]点[gold]格挡[/gold]。

name: Glass
description:
[gold]Passive:[/gold] At the end of turn, deal [blue][Passive][/blue] damage to ALL enemies and reduce this orb's value by [blue]1[/blue].
[gold]Evoke:[/gold] Deal [blue][Evoke][/blue] damage to ALL enemies.
description_raw:
[gold]Passive:[/gold] At the end of turn, deal [blue]{Passive}[/blue] damage to ALL enemies and reduce this orb's value by [blue]1[/blue].
[gold]Evoke:[/gold] Deal [blue]{Evoke}[/blue] damage to ALL enemies.
description_zh:
[gold]被动：[/gold]在回合结束时，对所有敌人造成[blue][Passive][/blue]点伤害，然后将这个充能球的数值减少[blue]1[/blue]。
[gold]激发：[/gold]对所有敌人造成[blue][Evoke][/blue]点伤害。
description_raw_zh:
[gold]被动：[/gold]在回合结束时，对所有敌人造成[blue]{Passive}[/blue]点伤害，然后将这个充能球的数值减少[blue]1[/blue]。
[gold]激发：[/gold]对所有敌人造成[blue]{Evoke}[/blue]点伤害。

name: Lightning
description:
[gold]Passive:[/gold] At the end of turn, deal [blue][Passive][/blue] damage to a random enemy.
[gold]Evoke:[/gold] Deal [blue][Evoke][/blue] damage to a random enemy.
description_raw:
[gold]Passive:[/gold] At the end of turn, deal [blue]{Passive}[/blue] damage to a random enemy.
[gold]Evoke:[/gold] Deal [blue]{Evoke}[/blue] damage to a random enemy.
description_zh:
[gold]被动：[/gold]回合结束时，对一名随机敌人造成[blue][Passive][/blue]点伤害。
[gold]激发：[/gold]对一名随机敌人造成[blue][Evoke][/blue]点伤害。
description_raw_zh:
[gold]被动：[/gold]回合结束时，对一名随机敌人造成[blue]{Passive}[/blue]点伤害。
[gold]激发：[/gold]对一名随机敌人造成[blue]{Evoke}[/blue]点伤害。

name: Plasma
description:
[gold]Passive:[/gold] At the start of turn,
gain [energy:1].
[gold]Evoke:[/gold] Gain [energy:2].
Plasma is unaffected by [gold]Focus[/gold].
description_raw:
[gold]Passive:[/gold] At the start of turn,
gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
[gold]Evoke:[/gold] Gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(2)}.
Plasma is unaffected by [gold]Focus[/gold].
description_zh:
[gold]被动：[/gold]回合开始时，
获得[energy:1]。
[gold]激发：[/gold]获得[energy:2]。
等离子充能球不受[gold]集中[/gold]影响。

获得{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}。
[gold]激发：[/gold]获得{energyPrefix:energyIcons(2)}。
